positive: Highly detailed, stylized celestial forest scene featuring interlocking geometric elements and bioluminescent flora. A central, symmetrical arrangement of stylized trees and crystalline vines forming a continuous, repeating pattern suitable for seamless apparel printing. Palette dominated by deep midnight blues, electric cyan, emerald green, and pops of luminous gold. Clean, graphic silhouette style with high contrast and crisp lines. Overhead, the full moon is depicted as a perfect circle, radiating subtle stardust. Minimalist yet complex, vector-art inspired quality. Centered composition, perfect for merchandise.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noisy, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, copyright, watermark, poor composition, jpeg artifacts
